props.title: Frequently Asked Questions about AC Tune-Up & Maintenance in {city}

faqs.question: How often should I schedule an AC tune-up?
faqs.answer: We recommend scheduling an AC tune-up at least once a year, ideally in the spring before the cooling season begins. Regular maintenance helps prevent breakdowns and keeps your system running efficiently.

faqs.question: What does an AC tune-up include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive tune-up includes inspecting and cleaning coils, checking refrigerant levels, testing electrical connections, lubricating moving parts, and ensuring your thermostat is calibrated correctly.

faqs.question: Can regular maintenance extend the life of my AC unit?
faqs.answer: Yes, regular maintenance can extend your AC unit's lifespan by several years. Well-maintained systems experience fewer breakdowns, run more efficiently, and maintain better performance over time.
